首页 / SaaS 定价规划器

SaaS 定价规划器

对比统一定价、分层定价、按量计费和免费增值四种定价模式。根据你的产品类型、受众和竞品价格获取个性化推荐。

🎭 场景预设

如何使用此工具

1
选择你的产品类型。
2
选择你的目标客户群体。
3
输入竞品平均价格（不知道可跳过）。
4
查看最匹配的定价模式推荐。
5
并排对比全部4种定价模式。
6
tools.solopreneur-saas-pricing-planner.how_to_use.5

常见问题

新的SaaS产品用哪种定价模式最好？

从统一定价或两个层级开始。先验证付费意愿，了解你的重度用户后再扩展到三个层级。

和竞品相比我应该定什么价？

如果你提供更多价值，可以贵20-50%。如果想快速进入市场，可以便宜20%。永远不要只拼价格——拼差异化价值。

什么是锚定定价？

设置一个高价档位，让你的中间档显得很划算。中间档会成为大多数买家的自然选择。

我应该在落地页上展示价格吗？

应该。透明的定价建立信任。如果必须隐藏（企业大单），至少展示起价或价格范围。

什么时候应该提价？

当你的产品价值比发布时显著增加，或者需求超过你的服务能力时提价。给老客户保留旧价格以避免流失。

结果

复制全部
示例

🎯 SaaS Pricing Planner

📦 Product: SaaS | 👤 Target: b2b | 💰 Competitor: $29/mo ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💰 Tier Snapshot: • Starter: $17/mo × 1000 customers = $17,000 MRR • Pro: $38/mo × 400 customers = $15,200 MRR • Max: $79/mo × 80 customers = $6,320 MRR • Enterprise: $499/mo × 12 customers = $5,988 MRR • Total MRR: $44,508 • Total Customers: 1,492 • ARPU: $30/mo ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📐 Key Metrics: • Weighted Gross Margin: 76.8% (blended across tiers) • Target Margin: 70.0% (industry benchmark: 70-80%) • ARPU by Tier: $17 / $38 / $79 / $499 • Margin by Tier: 85.0% / 75.0% / 70.0% / 65.0% • Enterprise % of MRR: 13.5% (high = strong moat) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🩺 Pricing Health: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • 🟢 All tiers above 50% margin — healthy pricing structure. • 🟡 Enterprise = 13.5% of MRR — healthy mix. • 🟢 Blended margin (76.8%) hits target. • 🟠 Pro tier 30%+ above competitor — risk of price objection. 🎯 LTV by Tier: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Starter: $482 (85.0% margin, 3.0% monthly churn) • Pro: $950 (75.0% margin) • Max: $1,843 (70.0% margin) • Enterprise: $10,812 (65.0% margin) • Average LTV: $763 • LTV Formula: (Price × Margin) / Monthly Churn ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚖️ Break-Even Customers per Tier: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Starter: ~139 customers to break even on $2K/mo costs • Pro: ~71 customers to break even on $2K/mo costs • Max: ~37 customers to break even on $2K/mo costs • Enterprise: ~7 customers to break even on $2K/mo costs • (Assumes $2K/mo fixed costs per tier — adjust based on actual overhead) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Raise all tiers 20%: Pro becomes $46/mo, MRR → $53,410 (test willingness to pay) • Cut Starter by 50%: Convert funnel to Pro — gain $11400/mo • Add annual discount (15% off): $388/yr vs $456/yr monthly • Move 10% of Pro users to Max: +$1,640/mo MRR • Drop lowest-margin tier (none): refocus on profitable tiers 📌 Recommended Action: Launch with Tiered model, Pro at $38/mo as the anchor. Use Starter as a low-friction entry point and Max/Enterprise to capture expansion revenue. • Flat-Rate: $20 – $29 – $44/mo Simple tools with one clear use case. Best for early-stage products. ⭐ Tiered: $15 – $29 – $73/mo Products with power users who will pay more for advanced features. • Usage-Based: $12 – $35 – $87/mo API products, AI tools, or any product where value scales with usage. • Freemium: $0 – $23 – $52/mo B2C products or tools that benefit from network effects and word-of-mouth. 🎯 Audience Insight: B2B buyers expect per-seat pricing and annual contracts. They value ROI calculators and case studies. 📦 Product Insight: SaaS benchmarks: 50-70% gross margins. Aim for LTV:CAC ratio of 3:1 or higher. 🚀 Next step: Pick one model, launch at the Pro tier ($38/mo), and adjust pricing after collecting 100+ conversion data points.
AdSense — tool result
